name: thedv91-skills
description: Claude Code skills for code review and React best practices.

plugins.name: auto-commit
plugins.description: Automatically commit tracked git changes after a build or task completes. Single Conventional Commit for small changes, or multiple logical commits grouped by architectural layer for large features. Commit-only: never pushes or amends. Supports --dry-run.

plugins.name: review-code-change
plugins.description: Review the diff of the current git branch against a target branch. Ships two flows: the multi-agent review-code-change skill (extensible standards — security, performance, business logic, React/Next.js/Node/TypeScript) and the /review-code slash command (blast-radius mapping grounded in real test/typecheck/lint output). Read-only git.

plugins.name: bugfix-pattern-sweep
plugins.description: Read the diff of a bug-fix (PR/MR, branch, or working tree), infer the root-cause anti-pattern it removed, then sweep the whole codebase for sibling occurrences of the same defect. Read-only: it reports and ranks, it does not edit.

plugins.name: react-compiler
plugins.description: Write React components and hooks fully compatible with React Compiler's automatic memoization.

plugins.name: react-effect-event
plugins.description: Use React's useEffectEvent to separate reactive dependencies from non-reactive latest-value reads inside Effects. React 19.2+.

plugins.name: file-hooks
plugins.description: Run project-defined commands on the file Claude just edited. A PostToolUse (Edit|Write) hook dispatches to per-project rules in .claude/file-hooks.json, matching the changed file by regex and substituting {file}. Shared mechanism, per-project commands.
